name: Crab Melt Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter one side of each piece of bread.
2. On the unbuttered side of each slice of bread, place a slice of cheese.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients: crab meat, chopped green onion, mayonnaise, and hot pepper sauce in a bowl.
4. Top one slice with the crabmeat filling.
5. Close the sandwich by placing the other slice on top.
6. Grill the sandwiches on a non-stick pan with the butter side down.
7. Brown each side slightly and cook until the cheese is melted.
8. Serve hot.
